name: TA-65 aging-associated microvascular dysfunction registry
summary: Planned randomized double-masked crossover registry testing whether TA-65 improves microvascular function, with nitric-oxide-mediated endothelium-dependent vasodilation as the primary outcome.
population: Estimated 180 adults aged 18 to 80 years with aging-associated microvascular dysfunction context

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry estimated primary completion on 2028-12-31 and study completion on 2029-12-31, with no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Planned registry context, not evidence of benefit.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This is the most current TA-65 human watchlist record and could later test vascular function, but the not-yet-recruiting status does not change the present evidence stage.
